data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'send-time optimization (send when customer usually opens)', but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for send-time optimization, yet there are no concrete examples or endpoints that demonstrate its coverage. This results in a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of send-time optimization functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
